_comment: STUB IFT key registry. Phase 2 ships these placeholder keys so the require_signed_metadata policy rule can be tested and demonstrated. Phase 3+ replaces this file with the real IFT registry once Logos publishes signed module metadata. Public keys here are derived from documented test seeds (see tests/test_keys.py) — NOT real IFT keys, NOT secret. Do not sign production modules with these keys.

keys.label: Stub IFT module signing key 001 (test fixture, NOT a real IFT key)
Stub IFT module signing key 002 (test fixture, NOT a real IFT key)
